title: Tilray Reports Strong Q1 2026 Earnings As The Cannabis Sector Rallies
text: Tilray reported strong Q1 2026 earnings as the cannabis sector rallied. The company achieved record Q1 net revenue and net income, demonstrating the strength of its business model. The cannabis sector rally benefited from federal rescheduling momentum and growing recognition of cannabis as a legitimate medical treatment. Tilray's strong earnings performance positioned it well to capitalize on emerging opportunities in the cannabis industry.
